Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Muhammet Murat Gorgoz. Author, maintainer.

  • Mehmet Guvenc Negiz. Author.

  • Kursad Ozkan. Author.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Gorgoz M, Negiz M, Ozkan K (2026). taxdiv: Taxonomic Diversity Indices Using Deng Entropy. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/mgorgoz/taxonomic-diversity-r. 

@Manual{,
  title = {taxdiv: Taxonomic Diversity Indices Using Deng Entropy},
  author = {Muhammet Murat Gorgoz and Mehmet Guvenc Negiz and Kursad Ozkan},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.1.0},
  url = {https://github.com/mgorgoz/taxonomic-diversity-r},
}

Ozkan K (2018). “A new proposed measure for estimating taxonomic diversity.” Turkish Journal of Forestry, 19(4), 336–346. doi:10.18182/tjf.441061. 

@Article{,
  title = {A new proposed measure for estimating taxonomic diversity},
  author = {Kursad Ozkan},
  journal = {Turkish Journal of Forestry},
  year = {2018},
  volume = {19},
  number = {4},
  pages = {336--346},
  doi = {10.18182/tjf.441061},
}

Deng Y (2016). “Deng entropy.” Chaos, Solitons & Fractals, 91, 549–553. 

@Article{,
  title = {Deng entropy},
  author = {Yong Deng},
  journal = {Chaos, Solitons \& Fractals},
  year = {2016},
  volume = {91},
  pages = {549--553},
}

Clarke K, Warwick R (1998). “A taxonomic distinctness index and its statistical properties.” Journal of Applied Ecology, 35, 523–531. 

@Article{,
  title = {A taxonomic distinctness index and its statistical properties},
  author = {K.R. Clarke and R.M. Warwick},
  journal = {Journal of Applied Ecology},
  year = {1998},
  volume = {35},
  pages = {523--531},
}
